notes.sg-consumer-behaviour-theory-of-planned-: The label 'planned behavior' is too short and ambiguous; 'theory of planned behavior' is more specific and commonly used in marketing literature.
notes.sg-consumer-behaviour-probabilistic-logi: This topic seems out of scope for consumer behavior within marketing. Probabilistic logic is a more general AI/logic concept.
notes.sg-consumer-behaviour-organizational-jus: Organizational justice is a topic within organizational behavior or management, not directly a subtopic of consumer behavior in marketing.
